owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Owner-ready monthly reactive SNC contract shipped; next bounded work is forwarding that fail-closed contract into real-session loop evidence and next-step artifacts

chunks.title: Forward monthly reactive owner test into loop artifacts
chunks.goal: Mirror the SNC published-monthly-reactive owner-test contract into tools/run_real_session_v0_loop.ps1 next-step markdown and evidence JSON so one run artifact can tell the owner exactly when and how to perform the first reactive monthly session test.
acceptance: Real-session loop next-step brief forwards monthly reactive owner-test readiness only when SNC next_action/reason indicate the published reactive contract is truly ready.
Evidence JSON stores the forwarded monthly reactive owner-test action, visible harmless marker set, and concrete post-test artifacts Codex should inspect.

If the active overlay is unpublished, lacks monthly reactive capability, or the gameplay-acceptance contract is not ready, the loop stays fail-closed and does not advertise the in-session reactive owner test.
Regression coverage proves the loop forwarding stays aligned with the SNC contract instead of free-form text scraping.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after loop owner-test forwarding
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after the real-session loop forwards the owner-ready monthly reactive test contract.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped SNC owner-ready monthly reactive test contract and loop-forwarding state.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving completed lifecycle/reactive groundwork chunks as ready.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
